sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108937" key="u(pope/tteuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποπέττευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n108937.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beguilement, deception,</tr_> a doubtful word in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.987e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
